name: polyglot-lang
description: Language support for Polyglot (.pg): syntax highlighting + a language server (diagnostics, go-to-definition, hover, document symbols, formatting).

polyglot.cliPath.description: Path to the polyglot CLI executable (which hosts the language server via `polyglot lsp`). Defaults to 'polyglot' on PATH; a relative path is resolved against the workspace root; set it to the built x64/Debug/MintPlayer.Polyglot.Cli.exe for a source checkout.

polyglot.lib.description: Comma-separated `lib` prelude sent to the server so ambient names (print, Math) resolve. Mirrors the CLI's --lib. Until per-project config (pgconfig.json) lands, this is the assumed prelude.

polyglot.trace.server.description: Trace the JSON-RPC traffic between VS Code and `polyglot lsp` (for debugging the server).
